caption: A green Polaris Sportsman all-terrain vehicle is parked on a concrete surface outdoors. The vehicle features large, knobby tires and displays the "POLARIS" logo on its rear cargo bed and side panels, along with the "SPORTSMAN" model name on the side. In the initial views, the camera focuses on the rear of the vehicle, showing the cargo bed and the tread of the back wheels. As the sequence progresses, the perspective shifts to a side profile, revealing the black seat, footwells, and the "6x6" designation on the rear fender, indicating it has six wheels. The vehicle remains stationary throughout the frames, while the camera moves to provide different angles of its chassis. In the background, a gray tarp and a brown wooden fence are visible. No people are present in the scenes.
